## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (Code style, architecture, performance improvements)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## Production Checklist 🚀
- [ ] My code follows the Clean Architecture guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (e.g., WebSocket lifecycle, state synchronization).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings in the CI/CD pipeline (Black, Ruff, Prettier).
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules.
